title: Heolic
body:
#Heolic Dimension Mod by Gardon

Lushness and wilderness is my name! When you install this mod, you too will be able to taste it!

#Heolic Dimension Mod Portal

We build it from quartz blocks and fire up Flint and Glowstone!

#Heolic Dimension Mod About

It is, above all, a dimension very lush and extremely full of new vegetation, trees and hostile mobs that we will have to fight! In time, when you are sufficiently strong, you can fight powerful bosses that can give you a hard time if you are poorly prepared!

#Heolic Dimension Mod Ending

The mod requires "GeckoLib" to work! One of my most ambitious projects that I think you'll like!
